name: Santa Cruz
content: People who have never been to California think Californians go to the beach to swim on a hot day. Real Californians go to the beach to sit in front of the ocean on a hot day, because it is practically like sitting in front of an open freezer. Sometimes, we’re even brave enough to dip our toes in the water (or just say screw it and get in the water anyway, but this is a pretty rare occurrence).
